sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO C_YZD_LICENCE_T (companyid,credentialstype,companyname,licenceno,chargeperson,allowrange,allowtype,jyfs, validitystart,validityend,allowunit,allowdate,direction,varietyyield,attachments, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($companyid$,$credentialstype$,'$companyname$','$licenceno$','$chargeperson$','$allowrange$','$allowtype$','$jyfs$', '$validitystart$','$validityend$','$allowunit$','$allowdate$','$direction$','$varietyyield$','$attachments$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(id) from c_yzd_licence_t where validflag > 0
companyid = $companyid$
allowdate = '$allowdate$'
'$validityend$' >= validitystart and validityend >= '$validityend$'

SELECT a.*,b.basicName FROM C_YZD_LICENCE_T a LEFT JOIN SYS_BASIC_MSG_T b ON a.credentialstype = b.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
a.companyid = $companyid$
a.allowdate = '$allowdate$'
'$validityend$' >= a.validitystart and a.validityend >= '$validityend$'
ORDER BY a.id

select A.*,group_concat(f.id order by f.id) as fileids,group_concat(f.fileallName order by f.id) as fileallnames from( SELECT a.*,b.basicName,group_concat(c.basicName separator ',') as allowtypeMs FROM (SELECT * FROM C_YZD_LICENCE_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0 AND id = 1)a LEFT JOIN SYS_BASIC_MSG_T b ON a.credentialstype = b.id left join SYS_BASIC_MSG_T c on find_in_set(c.id,a.allowtype) group BY a.id)A left join sys_file_t f on FIND_IN_SET(f.id,A.attachments)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_YZD_LICENCE_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE C_YZD_LICENCE_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0 WHERE companyid = $companyid$
update c_yzd_licence_t set companyname = '$companyname$' where companyid = $companyid$
